entry.name: itemsText
entry.default: Files|system-file-manager|dolphin Terminal|utilities-terminal|konsole Browser|internet-web-browser|xdg-open https: Settings|preferences-system|systemsettings Editor|accessories-text-editor|kate Calculator|accessories-calculator|kcalc Spectacle|spectacle|spectacle Lock|system-lock-screen|loginctl lock-session Logout|system-shutdown|qdbus6 org.kde.LogoutPrompt /LogoutPrompt org.kde.LogoutPrompt.promptAll
